afterSnapshot.name: getBestWindow

200.description: Calmest sailing window with timing, average wind/gust, score, hourly breakdown, and a reason string

500.description: Weather API error or insufficient forecast data

schema.summary: Get the calmest sailing window in the upcoming forecast

afterSnapshot.purpose: Return the calmest sailing window in the upcoming forecast for a lat/lon position.

context.userMessage: Approved — go ahead and build it. Run the tests and type checks to verify nothing is broken, and show me what changed.

rationale: New endpoint required to surface the lowest combined wind + gust block within the forecast horizon, with a reason string.
implementation: Mirrors getWeather: delegates coordinate validation to withValidatedCoords, fetches weather via the shared fetchWeather Result, then runs the pure computeBestWindow with config-driven window/horizon and maps the result to JSON.
